read:basic-4.txt.prompt: Read basic-4.txt from the start and show me the returned linehash-formatted lines.

read:blank-lines.txt.prompt: Read blank-lines.txt from the start and show me the returned linehash-formatted lines, including blank lines.

read:repeated-lines.txt.prompt: Read repeated-lines.txt from the start and show me the returned linehash-formatted lines so I can compare identical content lines.
